packageRules.description: Heavy automerge for everything — the CI suite (build + contract-validated acceptance tests + tfproviderlint + CodeQL + govulncheck) is the safety net, so anything that stays green merges itself.
Group all GitHub Actions bumps into one PR.
The generated go-domeneshop API client lives in a dead upstream repo pinned by pseudo-version; there is nothing to bump until we fork or regenerate it.
